title: Reverse-Engineering the Akai S3000XL MIDI-over-SCSI Protocol: An Odyssey
subtitle: How a failed attempt to run Akai's MESA II in a Mac OS 9 emulator led us through 38 disproven theories in five days of intense debugging, and ultimately to a standalone 68k emulator that cracked the protocol in four hours.
